source: Fabio Capello has emerged as the new favourite to succeed Steve McClaren as the England football team's new head coach after José Mourinho ruled himself out of taking the job.
foreignization: Fabio Capello telah muncul sebagai kegemaran baharu untuk menggantikan Steve McClaren sebagai ketua jurulatih baharu pasukan bola sepak England selepas José Mourinho menyingkirkan dirinya sendiri daripada mengambil pekerjaan tersebut.

source: The report, the product of a four-month investigation conducted by BP's Head of Safety Operations, Mark Bly, criticizes the oil rig's fire prevention systems, the crew of the rig for failing to realize and act upon evidence that oil was leaking from the surface of the ocean, and describes how BP and Transocean "incorrectly accepted" negative pressure test results.

source: “Heterotrophic bacteria counts in some of the bottles were found to be in revolting figures of (100) times more than the permitted limit,” said Sonish Azam, a Canadian researcher involved in the study, “This amount of bacteria is alarming, as if we are ingesting a cup of culture.”

Australia telah mendominasi separuh pertama, dan memimpin 25-3 pada masa separuh selepas cubaan daripada Matt Giteau, Stirling Mortlock dan Chris Latham dan satu gol jatuh daripada Berrick Barnes.
